Client-Specific Instructions

Loading Instructions Report to JNPT Gate 3 with RFID tag. Loading Bay slot 6:00–8:00 AM only. Driver must carry original permit + PAN card. Max loading time: 4 hours. Weigh-bridge at Gate exit is mandatory.
Unloading Instructions Mathura Refinery Loading Bay 4. Weigh-bridge mandatory before entry. Night unloading not permitted (gates close 9 PM). Safety induction for first-time drivers. POD must be signed by Warehouse Supervisor.
Reliance · Multi-Axle · Mumbai → Delhi Route Map

Vehicle Type: Multi-Axle Truck

This route is configured for Multi-Axle Trucks. Toll and diesel estimates are specific to this vehicle class per NHAI rates.
NHAI CategoryMulti-Axle (MAV)
Toll per Plaza (Avg)₹600 per plaza
Avg Loaded Weight25–35 MT
Avg Diesel KMPL3.2 kmpl
Diesel Price (Curr)₹89.60/litre
Same corridor for 2-Axle would cost ₹4,850 toll vs ₹8,400 for Multi-Axle. Container 40ft would cost ₹12,200.

Route Contracts Financial / Invoicing Layer — Separate from operational data

Route contracts hold only financial data: billing type, rate, SLA, demurrage, payment terms, GST. Operational data (toll, diesel, distance, instructions) lives on the Route itself. A single route can have multiple contracts over time — e.g., 2024 annual rate and 2025 renegotiated rate.
Contract ID Billing Type Rate SLA (Hours) Min Margin Volume Commitment Achieved (MTD) Demurrage Payment Terms GST Effective Status Actions
RC-2024-0017 Per KM ₹34.15/km 26 hrs 18% 20 trips/month
14
70%
₹500/hr
after 4 free hrs		 30 days 18% Jan 2024 — Open
Auto-renew ✓		 Active Edit Suspend
RC-2025-0003 Per Trip ₹52,000/trip 24 hrs 20% — No commitment ₹750/hr
after 6 free hrs		 15 days 18% Apr 2025 — Mar 2026 ⚠ Expiring Renew Edit
What Route Contract Does NOT Hold
Distance Toll Estimate Diesel Estimate Loading/Unloading Points Highway Info Key Stops
These are operational concerns on the Route. Contract deals only with money flow: rate, billing, SLA, payment, demurrage, cancellation.
FK Chain: Trip → Route Contract → Route → Client
Trip TRP-2024-0143 → RC-2024-0017 → RTE-0012 (This Route) → Reliance Industries
Trip stores route_contract_id (nullable — null for spot) and route_id (always set). From these two FKs, the system resolves client, vehicle type, rate, SLA, distance, tolls, everything.

New Route Contract

Route: Reliance Industries · Multi-Axle · Mumbai → Delhi (JNPT) RTE-0012
Default 18%. Override for SEZ/exempt clients.
